headline: CardioMech Shareholders Appoint Ramin Mousavi as Chairman of the Board
summary: Norway-based CardioMech AS, a medical device company developing a transfemoral, transseptally delivered mitral valve chordal repair technology in Fridley, MN, today announced the appointment of Ramin Mousavi as Chairman of the Board, effective immediately.

raw.headline: CardioMech Shareholders Appoint Ramin Mousavi as Chairman of the Board

headline: MiniMed launches Abbott-made Instinct glucose sensor in Europe
summary: Overseas markets are central to MiniMed’s business, accounting for 70% of reported net sales in the company’s 2026 financial year.
